THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLF, KURT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 559 VALENCIA STREET, ROOM 37; SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,081.86 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,081.86, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY. PLTFF WAIVES ATNY FEES & COSTS. SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY, IS FORFEITED.
